tools.name: create_shared_workspace
tools.description: Cache & share agent contexts - Save your current reasoning state, large JSON structures, or DOM elements to an ephemeral cloud workspace. Perfect for: caching large contexts before token limits, bridging multi-agent workflows, storing intermediate results, sharing data between sessions, or temporary code/data storage. Returns a shareable URL valid for 2 hours with auto-expiring data.

data.description: The payload to save - can be an object, array, or string

intent.description: Brief description of why you are saving this context (helps with debugging and analytics)

tools.name: get_shared_workspace
tools.description: Retrieve data from a shared workspace using its ID. Use this to read data that another agent (or yourself) saved previously.

workspace_id.description: The workspace ID (8-character identifier from the workspace URL)
